You've been told you're too sensitive. Too much. Not enough. ─────────────────── Your nervous system disagrees.
Some days you move mountains. Some days the email sits unopened for 72 hours. ─────────────────── Nobody taught you to read the difference.

WHO ORBITAL IS FOR
The executive who has everything and feels nothing.
The parent running on empty but can't name it.
The athlete whose training feels impossible for no reason.
The therapist who helps everyone but themselves.
The person who searches "why am I so tired" at 2am.
You.
EARLY OBSERVATIONS
"I finally have language for something I've felt my whole life."
— Early user, 34
"My therapist started recommending it."
— Beta tester, 41
